opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There's a really painful lump on my eyelid that's blown up over the last day, and it feels exactly like there's a bit of grit or glass stuck in my eye. My eye keeps watering and I'm scared something's seriously wrong with it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came up fast, it's got much worse in the last few hours, and I'm frightened about my eye.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about a day ago as a bit of tenderness on my upper eyelid
symptom_narrative.duration: around 24 hours, and it's got a lot worse in the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a sore, tender lump with a little yellow head on it, plus a gritty feeling like something's stuck in my eye
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really sore, it hurts to blink
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right on the edge of my upper eyelid
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and worse when I blink
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the eye closed takes the edge off
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: blinking, and touching or rubbing it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my eye's watering a fair bit, but my eyesight still seems normal
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get blocked, gritty, oily bits on my eyelids from time to time
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm keeping the eye shut a lot because blinking is painful

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I get recurring blocked oil glands and gritty eyelids

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own and I get anxious about anything happening to my eyes

objective_data_offered.value: a red, tender lump on the outer part of my upper eyelid with a small yellow whitehead right at the base of one of my eyelashes
my eyesight seems totally normal, I can read and see clearly out of that eye
moving my eye around doesn't hurt and I'm not seeing double
the white of my eye looks normal, not red, and the redness is only right on the lid edge, it hasn't spread across my whole eyelid or onto my cheek
no fever, I don't feel hot or shivery and my forehead feels normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-assessed, not measured with a thermometer
